news.title: RBI sold $6 billion in May to defend oil-hit Indian rupee, data shows
news.description: The Reserve Bank of India sold $6.1 billion in foreign exchange during May.  This intervention occurred as oil prices surged, pushing the rupee to a record low.  The central bank also implemented policy measures to encourage dollar inflows into India.

news.title: Oil rally weighs on Indian bonds, value buyers limit fall
news.description: Indian government bonds experienced a fourth consecutive session of decline on Wednesday.  Benchmark bond yields rose to their highest level since late June.  Rising oil prices and supply fears intensified concerns about India's economic outlook.  The Indian rupee weakened to a two-month low against

news.title: Bluestone stays resilient despite a turbulent quarter for India’s jewellery sector
news.description: Bluestone Jewellery reported a ₹6-crore profit in Q1 FY27 as revenue rose 49.6% to ₹736.8 crore, with repeat customers offsetting an industry-wide slowdown triggered by a gold import duty hike.
